<!-- Generated by /laravel-init -->
# /laravel-test

Run the test suite with coverage. Must pass before `/security-check`.

## Steps

### 1. Run Pest
```bash
./vendor/bin/pest --coverage --compact
```

Or if Pest is not installed:
```bash
php artisan test --compact
```

### 2. Report Results
- Total tests: X passed, X failed, X skipped
- Coverage: X% (target: as high as possible, minimum 80%)
- List any failing tests with file:line

### 3. If Tests Fail
- Fix the failing tests — do NOT skip or mark as incomplete
- Re-run until all pass
- Log failures + fixes to `tasks/progress.md`

### 4. Run Focused Tests During Development
```bash
./vendor/bin/pest --filter=FeatureName
./vendor/bin/pest --filter=ActionName
php artisan test --compact --filter=TestName
```

## Pass Criteria

All tests pass. Report final count and coverage percentage.
